---
title: "HerrCompBioinfo: An open-source educational resource of computational tools for Bioinformatics enthusiasts written in Spanish" 
description: | 
  This oral presentation was part of the 4th cohort of the Open Seeds program by OLS, held online.
date: "2022-01-19"
image: OLS_logo.png
categories:
  - 👨‍🏫Oral presentation 
  - 📚Education
  - 🧬Bioinformatics
---
[{{< fa calendar-check >}} Event][event]{.btn target=_blank} 
[{{< fa play-circle >}} Oral presentation (English)][oral-present]{.btn target=_blank} 
[{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill>}} Slides (English)][slides]{.btn target=_blank} 

You can find more details about this project [here][herrcompbio]. 

[herrcompbio]: ../../projects/HerrCompBioinfo/
[event]: https://openlifesci.org/ols-4
[oral-present]: https://youtu.be/BCBRC3vyNYg?list=PL1CvC6Ez54KCQDLgMKuFlcj2H6zsBi35D&t=1297
[slides]: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.5875039
